config._comment_strategy: EDGE_UPSERT is idempotent by edge_id and creates placeholder endpoints if topic scheduling delivers an edge before its nodes. EDGE_DELETE removes only the identified relationship.
config.neo4j.cypher.topic.cpg.edges: CALL { WITH event WITH event WHERE event.event_type = 'EDGE_DELETE' OPTIONAL MATCH ()-[r:CPG_EDGE {edge_id: event.edge_id}]->() DELETE r RETURN 0 AS action UNION WITH event WITH event WHERE event.event_type = 'EDGE_UPSERT' MERGE (src:CPGNode {node_id: event.source_id}) MERGE (dst:CPGNode {node_id: event.target_id}) MERGE (src)-[r:CPG_EDGE {edge_id: event.edge_id}]->(dst) SET r.edge_type = event.edge_type, r.file_id = event.file_id, r.path = event.path, r.content_sha256 = event.content_sha256, r.schema_version = event.schema_version, r.event_time = event.event_time, r.properties_json = apoc.convert.toJson(event.properties) RETURN 1 AS action } RETURN action
